name: Vegetable Soup (Santa Maria)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a soup pot and stir-fry onion for 1 minute.
2. Add the vegetables, salt, pepper, and soy sauce. Stir together for 2 minutes.
3. Add water and bring to a boil.
4. Simmer until the vegetables are tender.
5. Add watercress and serve.
